Operation 'getSignatureStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is identical to summary and provides no actionable context. Added clarity about what the token_requester parameter represents, what status information is returned, authentication/parameter requirements, and practical use cases for AI agents to understand when to invoke this operation in signature workflows.

data.summary_suggestion: Get signature request status by token
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of a signature request using the requester token. Returns signature status information including completion state, signer details, and any pending actions. Requires valid token_requester parameter. Use this operation to monitor the progress of signature workflows and determine if documents have been signed by all required parties.
data.reasoning: Original description is identical to summary and provides no actionable context. Added clarity about what the token_requester parameter represents, what status information is returned, authentication/parameter requirements, and practical use cases for AI agents to understand when to invoke this operation in signature workflows.

message: Operation 'downloadSignedFiles' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks specificity and context. Enhanced with information about required parameters (token and server), what file formats are returned, preconditions (all signatures must be complete), and timing expectations. This helps AI agents understand the operation's place in the signature workflow and when it's appropriate to call this endpoint.

data.description_suggestion: Downloads the finalized signed documents associated with a signature request. Requires the signature token and server identifier. Returns the signed PDF or image files in their original format. This operation should only be called after all required signatures have been completed. Files are typically available immediately after the final signature is applied.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity and context. Enhanced with information about required parameters (token and server), what file formats are returned, preconditions (all signatures must be complete), and timing expectations. This helps AI agents understand the operation's place in the signature workflow and when it's appropriate to call this endpoint.

data.current_description: Request signed token using public key
data.summary_suggestion: Generate authentication token with public key
data.description_suggestion: Generates a signed authentication token using the provided public key for API access. This token is required for subsequent API requests and should be included in the Authorization header as a Bearer token. Returns the signed token and its expiration details.
data.reasoning: Original description is repetitive and lacks essential context. Improved version clarifies the authentication workflow, explains token usage (Bearer token), and specifies what is returned. This helps AI agents understand when to call this operation and how to use the resulting token.

message: Operation 'startTask' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, unclear_purpose. Original description is too generic and doesn't explain what 'processing task' means in this domain. Improved version specifies this is for PDF/image processing, clarifies the required parameters (tool and region), and explains the return value (task ID) which is critical for AI agents to chain operations together.

data.description_suggestion: Initializes a new PDF or image processing task on the specified server and region. Requires the tool type (e.g., compress, merge, split) and target region as path parameters. Returns a task ID and status that should be used for subsequent file uploads and processing operations.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and doesn't explain what 'processing task' means in this domain. Improved version specifies this is for PDF/image processing, clarifies the required parameters (tool and region), and explains the return value (task ID) which is critical for AI agents to chain operations together.
